name: real_beacon_ab_ingest_samples
purpose: Sample payloads for the #52/#53 real BLE A/B beacon collector bridge.

beacons.label: target_candidate
beacons.notes: Set as BEACON_TARGET_MACS on the backend unless the field scan proves a different target mapping.

beacons.label: wrong_candidate
beacons.notes: Same UUID/major/minor as the target candidate; backend must distinguish by MAC or equivalent stable identifier.

fieldVerificationChecklist: Confirm whether FlutterBluePlus exposes C3:00:00:5C:B9:47 and C3:00:00:5C:B9:48 as device.remoteId.str on the Android device.
If advertisedName is non-empty, inject a BeaconIdResolver that returns result.device.remoteId.str so MAC remains available.
Record 10 near/mid/far RSSI samples per beacon before final calibration.
Keep backend BEACON_TARGET_MACS aligned with the target_candidate macAddress.
